tags: Scores 1.0 if the target pubkey has published at least one kind 10002 relay list event.
content:
plan
  relay_list = do 'nostr.query' {kinds: [10002], authors: [_.targetPubkey], limit: 1}
in
let
  events = relay_list | [],
  has_relay_list = length(events) >= 1
in
if has_relay_list then 1.0 else 0.0
